policy_layer.content: The Low Carbon Mobility Blueprint outlines strategies to reduce transport emissions through vehicle electrification, energy efficiency, and adoption of alternative fuels.
Malaysia aims to achieve net-zero carbon emissions by 2050, providing a long-term sustainability framework for reducing greenhouse gas emissions across all sectors including transport.
The Johor-Singapore Special Economic Zone promotes green economy initiatives, including sustainable transport integration and smart mobility infrastructure across borders.

infrastructure_layer.content: The RTS Link is a cross-border rail system connecting Johor Bahru and Singapore, designed to reduce congestion and provide efficient high-capacity transport.
Singapore's MRT system provides extensive urban rail coverage and plays a key role in reducing private vehicle dependency and emissions.
Road transport networks include highways and urban roads that support private and commercial vehicle movement but are major contributors to congestion and emissions.

data_layer.content: Carbon Monitor provides near real-time CO2 emissions data across sectors including transport, enabling tracking of emission trends and activity levels.
Emission factors from IPCC and DEFRA provide standardized values to calculate CO2 emissions per kilometer or per transport mode.
Weather data including rainfall, temperature, and humidity impacts traffic conditions, fuel consumption, and emission levels.

intelligence_layer.content: Smart mobility research highlights the role of AI and IoT in optimizing transport systems, reducing congestion, and improving sustainability.
Behavioral studies show that providing users with emission visibility and alternatives encourages adoption of sustainable transport modes.

realtime_layer.content: Real-time traffic data reflects current congestion levels, delays, and travel time variability in cross-border routes.
Real-time weather conditions such as rain and storms directly affect traffic flow, safety, and vehicle emissions.
RTS Link schedule data provides real-time updates on train frequency, delays, and availability for cross-border travel.
